name: superpowers-plus
description: Superpowers Plus: an agentic skills framework and software development methodology with planning, execution routing, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Superpowers Plus planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Superpowers Plus to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, execution routing, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
